calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-23-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Linda S. Forster, 13286.

Francisco G. Torres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Davis Realty Company, Incorporated.
Gloria Gutierrez, Office Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Cathy Wing, a/k/a Catherine Wing.
Defendant Club 65 was dismissed without prejudice on June 5, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 6, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Standard Industrial/Commercial Multi-Tenant, dated 07/01/00--------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Three Day Notice to Pay Rent or Quit, dated 04/05/08---------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Davis Realty Company, Incorporated, and against defendant Cathy Wing, a/k/a Catherine Wing as follows:

Plaintiff Davis Realty Company, Incorporated shall recover from defendant Cathy Wing, a/k/a Catherine Wing Rent/Per Diem Damages in the sum of $13,251.92, and Costs in the amount of $325.00, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $13,603.92.

Plaintiff Davis Realty Company, Incorporated is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 65 Taylor Street, San Francisco, CA 94102. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
